events.title: Hezbollah Rocket Attack Damages Ancient Church in Israel
events.desc: Hezbollah launched a significant rocket barrage targeting northern Israel, resulting in damage to a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya. This attack underscores the ongoing conflict and its impact on cultural heritage sites in the region.

events.title: US and Iranian Delegations Meet in Islamabad for Peace Talks
events.desc: A high-level Iranian delegation arrived in Islamabad, Pakistan, for critical talks with US officials aimed at de-escalating the ongoing conflict. The meeting is seen as a crucial step towards achieving a ceasefire and addressing regional stability.

events.title: Islamabad on High Alert Ahead of US-Iran Peace Talks
events.desc: Islamabad has implemented a significant security lockdown, deploying over 10,000 military and police personnel in anticipation of the arrival of US and Iranian delegations for peace talks. This heightened security reflects the sensitivity and importance of the negotiations.

events.title: US-Iran War Ceasefire Talks Underway Amid Tensions in Pakistan
events.desc: New tensions have emerged just before crucial US-Iran ceasefire talks are set to begin in Pakistan. An Iranian official stated that conditions for talks have not yet been met, while former President Trump reiterated threats of renewed attacks, complicating the diplomatic efforts.

events.title: US Team Heads to Iran Talks in Pakistan with Low Expectations
events.desc: A US team, led by Vice President JD Vance, has departed for Islamabad for talks with Iran. However, expectations are low as both nations accuse each other of breaching commitments made for a temporary ceasefire, casting doubt on the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their corresponding passwords have been leaked online, revealing significant vulnerabilities in ministries handling sensitive information. The breach affects 12 out of 13 ministries.

events.title: Iranian Asymmetric Counterair Campaign Targets US Air Force Assets
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles have struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging KC-135 tankers. These attacks are part of a broader Iranian counterair campaign aimed at degrading US and Israeli air capabilities in the region.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: US Possibly Deployed Mines Over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US may have deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over Kafari, a village in southern Iran, resulting in civilian casualties. Experts identified the munitions as US-made anti-tank mines.

events.title: Iran War's Widening Impacts Across Middle East and North Africa
events.desc: The conflict with Iran has generated significant ripple effects throughout the Middle East and North Africa, with direct attacks experienced by Gulf Arab states, Iraq, and Jordan. Israel has intensified bombing in Lebanon in response to Hezbollah attacks.

events.title: US Aims to Reopen Strait of Hormuz Amidst Ongoing Tensions
events.desc: President Donald Trump has stated that the US will work to reopen the Strait of Hormuz 'fairly soon,' acknowledging the difficulty of the task. He indicated that other nations are offering assistance in this endeavor.

events.title: Lebanon and Israel Set for Talks in US Amidst Ceasefire Concerns
events.desc: Lebanon and Israel are scheduled to hold talks in Washington next Tuesday to discuss a ceasefire in the Israel-Hezbollah war and the initiation of negotiations. This comes as Israel launched strikes in Lebanon after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced, raising concerns about adherence to the truce.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Hit Lebanon Despite Ceasefire Announcement
events.desc: Hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced, Israel conducted a major wave of strikes across Lebanon, hitting the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon, and the eastern Bekaa Valley. These strikes resulted in at least 182 deaths and 890 injuries, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

events.title: Iran Imposes Internet Blackout Amidst Israeli and American Strikes
events.desc: The Iranian government deliberately dismantled its communications infrastructure, causing a near-total internet blackout with a 98 percent collapse in traffic following Israeli and American strikes on military installations. This action was aimed at the Iranian populace, restricting information flow.

events.title: Trump Accuses Iran of Mismanaging Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: President Donald Trump criticized Iran's handling of the Strait of Hormuz, stating it deviates from the agreed-upon terms and accusing Tehran of 'short term extortion.' He asserted that Iran has limited leverage in upcoming negotiations, apart from its control over the vital shipping channel.

events.title: Lebanon Boosts Army Presence in Beirut Amidst Hezbollah Criticism of Israel Talks
events.desc: The Lebanese government is increasing its military and police presence in Beirut as Hezbollah expresses strong disapproval of the planned talks with Israel. This move by the government aims to assert authority in the capital, earning praise from Gulf states.

infrastructure.name: Prince Sultan Air Base
infrastructure.note: Royal Saudi Air Force base housing US personnel and assets
